title: Colour symbolism
wikitext:
[]: Colour symbolism             Quote Post by AprilMei » Thu Jan 01, 2015 9:17 pm Hello, this is my very first post here, I actually has already read a lot of posts from here, but I just made an account since I felt like I needed to post this. Also, sorry, I'm not a native english speaker so I may make some typos from time to time. Also, this post takes into account that theory that says that NGE takes place directly before NTE, the sequel theory, but most precisely from the manga ending. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jan 01, 2015 10:55 pm Welcome to the forums! Just a headsup, I spoiler tagged your post. The Extra Stage discussion is considered Spoilers because it's not released in all countries yet. See here for discussion on it: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/16414/SPOILER-TAGS-Last-Eva-Manga-Volume-Features-New-Character/ As for your theory, I think similar thoughts have been tossed around in the linked thread, but color theory and what it means for just NTE have definitely been discussed before: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/12498/30-Tangent-Color-theme-discussion/

Article: Colour symbolism

Also, sorry, I'm not a native english speaker so I may make some typos from time to time. Also, this post takes into account that theory that says that NGE takes place directly before NTE, the sequel theory, but most precisely from the manga ending. SPOILER: Show
